entries.value:
<color={t:damageColor}>All your health points were spent!</color>

Remember to use food and potions to restore your HP the next time.

Press <color={t:highlightColor}>ENTER</color> to restart.

<color={t:infoColor}>Thank you for shopping!</color>

Your inventory and the Witch's stock will remain as you left them for next time.

Press <color={t:highlightColor}>ENTER</color> to restart.

Buy the <color={t:entityColor}>Shop</color>'s selected item for a <color={t:infoColor}>{0:P0}</color> of its value. You can also drag and drop the item directly into the <color={t:entityColor}>Player</color>'s inventory.

Sells the <color={t:entityColor}>Player</color>'s selected item for a <color={t:infoColor}>{0:P0}</color> of its value. You can also drag and drop the item directly into the <color={t:entityColor}>Shop</color>'s inventory.
Uses the <color={t:entityColor}>Player</color>'s selected consumable item. You can also drag and drop the item directly into the <color={t:entityColor}>Player</color>'s health bar.
Exit the Witch's Shop and go to the next scene.

Searches your magical pockets for randomly weighted <color={t:highlightColor}>Baubles</color> that you could sell. This will fail if there are no valid slots remaining in the <color={t:entityColor}>Player</color>'s inventory.

Searches the <color={t:entityColor}>Shop</color> for randomly weighted <color={t:highlightColor}>Foods</color>, <color={t:highlightColor}>Potions</color>, or <color={t:highlightColor}>Weapons</color>. This will fail if there are no valid slots remaining in the <color={t:entityColor}>Shop</color>'s inventory.

Good morning! I'm willing to sell items from my inventory for a <color={t:infoColor}>{0:P0}</color> of their value and buy items from your inventory at a <color={t:infoColor}>{1:P0}</color> of their value.

A sweet and yummy cookie.
Restores <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color>.

A delicious slice of pizza.
Restores <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color>.

A mysterious potion.
Restores  <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color> and increases your <color={t:maxHPColor}>maximum HP</color> by <color={t:maxHPColor}>{1}</color>.

The empty vial can be reused.

This huge and rare egg is known for its vitalizing properties when its yolk is consumed raw.
Restores  <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color> and increases your <color={t:maxHPColor}>maximum HP</color> by <color={t:maxHPColor}>{1}</color>.

The empty shell is valuable for alchemists.

A mysterious poison.
Deals <color={t:damageColor}>{0:ABS}</color> damage when consumed.

The empty vial can be reused.

A well-balanced battle axe.
Increases your <color={t:damageColor}>damage</color> by <color={t:damageColor}>{0}</color>.

This mystical wand shoots high-speed fireballs at your enemies.
Increases your <color={t:damageColor}>damage</color> by <color={t:damageColor}>{0}</color>.
Sells at full value. Can only be sold.
A shoddy-looking sapphire. A merchant might pay a decent enough amount for it.
A weighty bar of pure gold, a merchant would pay a good sum for it.
A box filled to the brim with loot from your adventures.
These rare eggshells are highly valued by alchemists.
